carpet.rule.renewableCalcite.name: renewableCalcite
carpet.rule.renewableCalcite.desc: Lava flowing over bone blocks generates calcite when it finds an adjacent amethyst block in the same positions used by vanilla basalt generation.
carpet.rule.renewableTuff.name: renewableTuff
carpet.rule.renewableTuff.desc: Enables the furnace recipe that smelts gravel into tuff.
carpet.rule.renewableLapisOre.name: renewableLapisOre
carpet.rule.renewableLapisOre.desc: Enables the calcite and amethyst shard crafting recipe for lapis ore.
carpet.rule.renewableLeavesCrafting.name: renewableLeavesCrafting
carpet.rule.renewableLeavesCrafting.desc: Enables shaped crafting recipes that turn sticks plus matching logs into their corresponding leaves.
carpet.rule.renewableRawOresCrafting.des: Enables the cobblestone plus ingot crafting recipes for raw iron, raw copper, and raw gold. If you want the anvil-smash conversion instead, check MiniTweaks and its /carpet renewableRawOres rule.
carpet.rule.renewableHoneycombCrafting.d: Enables the recipe that turns one honeycomb block back into four honeycombs.
carpet.rule.boneMealGrassifyDirt.name: boneMealGrassifyDirt
carpet.rule.boneMealGrassifyDirt.desc: Allows bone meal used on dirt to convert it into a grass block when grass can survive there, with happy_villager particles and the bone meal use sound.
carpet.rule.obsidianHardnessReinforcedDe: Makes reinforced deepslate break at an obsidian-like mining speed instead of its normal slower break time.
carpet.rule.silkTouchableReinforcedDeeps: Allows reinforced deepslate to drop itself when mined with Silk Touch.
carpet.rule.wardensDropReinforcedDeepsla: Makes wardens drop 1 to 4 reinforced deepslate when they die.
carpet.rule.pistonHarvestableAmethysts.d: Budding amethyst breaks and drops itself when a piston tries to push it.
